proof: function[T0: lib(add_semigroup).AddSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 + x1 + x2 = x0 + (x1 + x2) }[T](d2, ad, ad)

function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0) { -x0 + x0 = T0.0 }[T](d2)

function[T0: lib(add_monoid).AddMonoid](x0: T0) { T0.0 + x0 = x0 }[T](-d2)

goal: t * ad + t * ad = t * (ad + ad)
proof: function[T0: lib(semiring.base).Semiring](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 + x0 * x2 = x0 * (x1 + x2) }[T](t, ad, ad)

goal: t * t * d2 + t * ad + t * ad = t * t * d2 - t * d2
proof: function[T0: lib(add_semigroup).AddSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 + x1 + x2 = x0 + (x1 + x2) }[T](t * t * d2, t * ad, t * ad)
function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[T](t * t * d2, t * d2)

goal: T.0 - (t * t * d2 + t * ad + t * ad) = t * d2 - t * t * d2
proof: function[T0: lib(add_comm_group).AddCommGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { -(x0 - x1) = x1 - x0 }[T](t * t * d2, t * d2)
function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[T](T.0, t * t * d2 + t * ad + t * ad)
function[T0: lib(add_monoid).AddMonoid](x0: T0) { T0.0 + x0 = x0 }[T](t * d2 - t * t * d2)
function[T0: lib(semiring.base).Semiring](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 + x0 * x2 = x0 * (x1 + x2) }[T](t, T.1, -t)
function[T0: lib(ring).Ring](x0: T0, x1: T0) { -(x0 * x1) = x0 * -x1 }[T](t, t)
function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[T](t, t * t)
function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[T](T.1, t)
function[T0: lib(monoid).Monoid](x0: T0) { x0 * T0.1 = x0 }[T](t)

goal: (t - t * t) * d2 = t * d2 - t * t * d2
proof: function[T0: lib(semiring.base).Semiring](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 + x2 * x1 = (x0 + x2) * x1 }[T](t, d2, -(t * t))

function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[T](t, t * t)
function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[T](t * d2, t * t * d2)

goal: T.0 - (t * t * d2 + t * ad + t * ad) = t * (T.1 - t) * d2

proof: function[T0: lib(semigroup).Semigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 * x2 = x0 * (x1 * x2) }[T](t * t, s * s, d2 * d2)

function[T0: lib(semigroup).Semigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 * x2 = x0 * (x1 * x2) }[T](t * s * d2, d2, t * s)

goal: t * t * (s * s) = t * s * (t * s)

function[T0: lib(semigroup).Semigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 * x2 = x0 * (x1 * x2) }[T](t, t, s * s)
function[T0: lib(comm_semigroup).CommSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 }[T](s, t * s)
function[T0: CommRing](x0: Point2[T0], x1: Point2[T0]) { (x0 - x1).norm_sq = x0.dist_sq(x1) }[T](p, a)

function[T0: CommRing](x0: Point2[T0], x1: Point2[T0], x2: T0) { x0 + (x1 - x0).smul(x2) = x0.param_line(x1, x2) }[T](a, b, t)

goal: a.norm_sq + e = a.norm_sq + d.norm_sq + a.dot(d) + a.dot(d)
proof: function[T0: lib(add_semigroup).AddSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 + x1 + x2 = x0 + (x1 + x2) }[T](d.norm_sq, a.dot(d), a.dot(d))

function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 + x1 != x0 + x2 or x1 = x2 }[T](a.norm_sq, e, a.norm_sq + e - a.norm_sq)

function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0) { x0 + -x0 = T0.0 }[T](a.norm_sq)

goal: p.norm_sq = a.norm_sq + t * t * d.norm_sq + t * a.dot(d) + t * a.dot(d)

proof: function[T0: lib(add_semigroup).AddSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 + x1 + x2 = x0 + (x1 + x2) }[T](a.norm_sq, t * t * d.norm_sq + t * a.dot(d), t * a.dot(d))
function[T0: lib(add_semigroup).AddSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 + x1 + x2 = x0 + (x1 + x2) }[T](a.norm_sq, t * t * d.norm_sq, t * a.dot(d))
function[T0: lib(add_comm_group).AddCommGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: T0) { x0 - x1 + (x2 - x3) = x0 + x2 - (x1 + x3) }[T](a.norm_sq, a.norm_sq, T.0, delta)
function[T0: lib(add_monoid).AddMonoid](x0: T0) { T0.0 + x0 = x0 }[T](T.0 - delta)

goal: a.norm_sq - a.param_line(b, t).norm_sq = t * (T.1 - t) * b.sub(a).norm_sq
p.dist_sq(a) * p.dist_sq(b) = t * (T.1 - t) * d.norm_sq * (t * (T.1 - t) * d.norm_sq)
(a.norm_sq - p.norm_sq) * (a.norm_sq - p.norm_sq) = t * (T.1 - t) * d.norm_sq * (t * (T.1 - t) * d.norm_sq)
a.param_line(b, t).dist_sq(a) * a.param_line(b, t).dist_sq(b) = (a.norm_sq - a.param_line(b, t).norm_sq) * (a.norm_sq - a.param_line(b, t).norm_sq)
